title: SolaceTier Tagger Mod
description: Displays players' SolaceTiers PvP tiers above their nametag and in the tab list directly from SolaceTiers.com.
body:
# TierTagger

The official **SolaceTiers nametag tier mod**.

*Displays PvP tiers above players' nametags and in the player list directly from SolaceTiers.*

---

![NameTag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07297556b0e966acc918077e98a5667907f7faef_0.webp)
![TabList](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67eeb1365edc74eee5015f3055c56aebf291281d.png)
---

## Features

* Shows PvP tiers beside player nametags
* Displays tiers in the tab player list
* Supports multiple PvP gamemodes
* Configurable settings menu
* Customizable tier colors
* Lightweight and client-side only

Tier data is fetched directly from **SolaceTiers**.

---

## Configuration

The mod includes an easy-to-use **in-game configuration menu** where you can:

* Enable or disable the mod
* Select the **gamemode to display**
* Toggle tiers in the **player list**
* Toggle tiers above **player nametags**
* Customize **tier colors**

![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed33a9ae5d2ebe2d86465772ecf71dddd9fd5b3a_0.webp)
---

## Minecraft Version Support

Currently supported versions:

**1.21 → 1.21.11**

Support for newer versions will be added as they release.

---

## Notes

* This is a **client-side mod**.
* The server **does not need to install the mod**.
* Works on **any Minecraft server**.
